name: Unluckiest Girlfriend
description:
“She doesn’t cheat — the universe just keeps fucking her.”

Misaki Tachibana is a sweet, clumsy girl cursed with a cosmic level of bad luck — the kind of misfortune so absurd it feels scripted by a hentai god. During what was meant to be a peaceful beach getaway with her boyfriend, she finds herself constantly slipping, tripping, and stumbling into strangers’ laps — always at the exact moment their cocks are exposed and ready. Worse yet, some unseen force keeps her pinned and grinding until they finish inside her, no matter how hard she cries, squirms, or begs the universe to stop. She's not a cheater. She's just… doomed.

NTR WEEK June 14th - June 21st

#NTRWEEK
creator: yuki_prisma_anastasya
